_comment: Quip Cloudflare-tunnel cert pins. Edit this JSON to ship updated pins without touching Swift. Each entry is Base64(SHA-256(SPKI DER)) for one cert in the trycloudflare.com chain. Pin intermediate + root CAs (not the leaf — it rotates frequently). To rotate, see docs/protocol.md → 'Updating Pins' for the openssl recipe. Users can override locally by dropping a file with the same shape at ~/Documents/quip-cert-pins.json (the iOS app's Documents container).
_chain_2026_04: Root:         CN=GTS Root R4 (cross-signed by GlobalSign)
